funding_match.body: Hello {customer_name}, great news! A funding opportunity matching your profile (up to {amount} {currency}) is available. Reply YES to learn more.
funding_match.example: Hello Alice, great news! A funding opportunity matching your profile (up to 50000 USD) is available. Reply YES to learn more.

investor_match.body: Hi {customer_name}, we found a matching investor for {startup_name}: {investor_name} ({firm_name}). Match score: {match_score}%. View details in your Documotion dashboard.
investor_match.example: Hi Bob, we found a matching investor for TechStart: Alice Ventures (AV Capital). Match score: 95%. View details in your Documotion dashboard.

general_update.body: Hello {customer_name}, here is an update regarding your {startup_name} profile: {message}
general_update.example: Hello Alice, here is an update regarding your TechStart profile: Your document has been verified.
